# CWE-214 negative: token supplied via stdin not argv
lang: go
file: CWE-214-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os/exec"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-214 Invocation of Process Using Visible Sensitive Information (mitigated)
func BackupDatabase(c *gin.Context) {
	token := c.GetHeader("X-Api-Token")
	cmd := exec.Command("pg_dump", "--db", "billing")
	cmd.Stdin = strings.NewReader(token)
	if err := cmd.Run(); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "backup"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "started"})
}
